name: Spicy Jalapeno Eggs and Sweet Pepper

ingredients.item: small sweet bell pepper, yellow, orange, or red

method: Preheat oven to the high broil.
Put tomatoes slices in an oven pan. Add salt, pepper, and olive oil.
Chop garlic. And add butter in it.
When tomatoes are cooked, take the pan out of the oven and push
tomatoes to the oven pan's edges.
Break eggs in the middle, and put the sliced jalapeno and pepper
Add pepper and salt, and put it back for almost 6-8 minutes.
Put garlic slices of sourdough to toast.
Take a sourdough slice and top it with tomatoes, and egg.
Garnish it with basil, and serve.
